---
title: "PWP Gap Time Cox Model — Summary: `r params$target_drug`"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false
    theme: flatly
params:
  result_files: !r character(0)
  target_drug:  "Semaglutide"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
source("helper_functions.R")
```

```{r build-table}
rows <- lapply(params$result_files, function(f) {
  load(f)   # restores pwp_result
  r <- pwp_result

  coefs <- summary(r$fit)$coefficients
  hr    <- coefs["treatment", "exp(coef)"]
  pval  <- coefs["treatment", "Pr(>|z|)"]

  se    <- if ("robust se" %in% colnames(coefs)) coefs["treatment", "robust se"] else coefs["treatment", "se(coef)"]
  hr_lo <- exp(log(hr) - 1.96 * se)
  hr_hi <- exp(log(hr) + 1.96 * se)

  n_target     <- sum(r$out$treatment[r$out$event_num == 1L] == 1L)
  n_comparator <- sum(r$out$treatment[r$out$event_num == 1L] == 0L)

  data.frame(
    Target             = r$target_drug,
    Comparator         = r$comparator_group,
    N_Target           = n_target,
    N_Comparator       = n_comparator,
    Dependent_Variable = r$dep_var,
    Period             = r$period_name,
    Covariates         = paste(r$covariates, collapse = ", "),
    Hazard_Ratio       = hr,
    CI_95              = paste0("(", round(hr_lo, 3), ", ", round(hr_hi, 3), ")"),
    P_Value            = pval,
    stringsAsFactors   = FALSE
  )
})

summary_tab <- do.call(rbind, rows)
```

```{r render-table}
summary_tab %>%
  mutate(
    N_Target     = comma(N_Target),
    N_Comparator = comma(N_Comparator),
    Hazard_Ratio = round(Hazard_Ratio, 3),
    Sig          = sig_code(P_Value),
    P_Value      = ifelse(P_Value < 0.001, "<0.001", round(P_Value, 3))
  ) %>%
  rename(
    `Target`             = Target,
    `Comparator`         = Comparator,
    `N (Target)`         = N_Target,
    `N (Comparator)`     = N_Comparator,
    `Dependent Variable` = Dependent_Variable,
    `Period`             = Period,
    `Covariates`         = Covariates,
    `Hazard Ratio`       = Hazard_Ratio,
    `95% CI`             = CI_95,
    `P-Value`            = P_Value,
    ` `                  = Sig
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html", escape = FALSE,
               align = c("l","l","r","r","l","l","l","r","r","r","l")) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"),
                            full_width = TRUE, font_size = 14) %>%
  kableExtra::footnote(general       = "Signif. codes: 0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1",
                       general_title = "",
                       escape        = FALSE)
```
